leadText: The Camping Gear (Japanese: キャンプセット Camp Set) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Camping Gear allows the player to set up a Pokémon Camp . It cannot be used on water, in buildings, or while challenging a Gym , the Champion Cup tournament , or the Galarian Star Tournament .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Everything you need to set up a tent and get cooking in a Wild Area or at a camping spot.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Camping Gear allows the player to set up a Pokémon Camp . It cannot be used on water, in buildings, or while challenging a Gym , the Champion Cup tournament , or the Galarian Star Tournament . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Everything you need to set up a tent and get cooking in a Wild Area or at a camping spot. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh Wedgehurst (from Mum at Wedgehurst Station , before departing on a train for the first time)
